sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, value DOUBLE, timestamp TIMESTAMP, category VARCHAR(255), interval_col INTERVAL);
SELECT max_by(value, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM timestamp) - INTERVAL '1 HOUR', 2) AS max_values FROM test_table WHERE category IS NOT NULL GROUP BY category;
SELECT category, max_by(value + INTERVAL '2 HOUR', id - 1, 3) AS complex_max FROM test_table GROUP BY category HAVING max_by(value, NULLIF(value, value)) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT max_by(value, id, 3) FROM (SELECT id, value, timestamp FROM test_table WHERE interval_col < INTERVAL '15 HOUR' ORDER BY timestamp DESC) AS inner_query GROUP BY id;
CREATE TABLE temp_data (num INT, str_col VARCHAR(100));

SELECT category, COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT category, value - (SELECT MAX(num) FROM temp_data) AS adjusted_value FROM test_table) AS derived WHERE adjusted_value >= 0 GROUP BY category HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
SELECT DISTINCT max_by(value, (interval_col + INTERVAL '1 DAY') - INTERVAL '1 HOUR', 2) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL OR category IS NOT NULL;

SELECT * FROM (SELECT category, max_by(value, ROUND(value / NULLIF(value, value)), 2) AS max_val FROM test_table GROUP BY category) AS aggregated_data WHERE max_val IS NOT NULL ORDER BY max_val DESC LIMIT 5;
